backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the MediTrack backend, managing medical records (CBC, LFT, Cholesterol, etc.), user profiles, and family member profiles with authorization checks and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report specifying a task to fix date extraction logic in `ocrExtraction.ts`, expanding regex patterns to cover multiple medical date formats and returning ISO date strings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for backgrounds, cards, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the MediTrack React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading `src/main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with protected and public routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders the Toaster notification component.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisDashboar: Category-tabbed medical analysis dashboard with a family member filter, rendering progression charts and trend summaries using Recharts and React Query data, with loading skeletons and insufficient-data states.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that shows a loading spinner while identity or profile loads, and renders a ProfileSetupModal if the authenticated user has no profile yet.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFieldSet: Renders a dynamic form fieldset based on the selected medical record category, showing numeric input groups for lab results (CBC, LFT, etc.) or a description/severity form for general ailments.
frontend/src/components/DashboardSidebar: A sticky sidebar component displaying total record count, quick navigation links, and a per-category record breakdown with icons and badges.
frontend/src/components/FileUploadZone.t: A drag-and-drop file upload zone that accepts PDF, PNG, and JPEG files up to 5MB, with validation error display and a selected-file preview with a clear button.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout wrapping all pages with a navigation bar, auth guard, optional dashboard sidebar (shown when records exist), page outlet, and footer.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MedicalRecordFor: A form for adding medical records with category selection, date picker, family member assignment, dynamic category-specific fields, validation, and submission via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: A sticky top navigation bar with the MediTrack logo, authenticated desktop and mobile nav links, and a user identity indicator with a mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name to create a health profile, using the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation and blocking dismissal until submitted.
frontend/src/components/ProgressionChart: A Recharts-based line chart component that visualizes medical metric trends over time, with reference range lines and a custom tooltip showing in/out-of-range status.
frontend/src/components/TimelineCard.tsx: A collapsible card component that displays a single medical record entry with its type, date, and expandable data fields including reference-range validation indicators and a delete button.
frontend/src/components/TimelineView.tsx: A tabbed timeline view that lists medical records filtered by record type and family member, with loading skeletons and an empty state, sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/components/TrendSummary.tsx: Renders a grid of metric trend cards showing direction icons, trend badges (improving/worsening/stable), value progression, and percentage change for a list of MetricTrend objects.
frontend/src/components/UploadRecordForm: A multi-step form for uploading medical record files that performs OCR extraction, presents extracted records for review/editing, handles family member assignment (including creating new members), and saves records via API mutations.
frontend/src/components/UserIdentityIndi: Renders a dropdown menu showing the authenticated user's name/principal with a logout option that clears identity and redirects to the login page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentity context and hook for managing ICP authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via AuthClient, along with a React provider component.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on user profiles, family members, and medical records, wrapping the ICP backend actor calls with caching and invalidation logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that defines a medical teal-themed design system using Tailwind CSS with CSS custom properties for light/dark mode color tokens and utility component classes.
frontend/src/lib/ocrExtraction.ts: Utility library that extracts structured test data and dates from raw text (e.g., decoded PDF/image bytes) using regex-based pattern matching for medical lab reports.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddRecordPage.tsx: Page component that presents a tabbed interface for adding medical records either via manual form entry or by uploading and auto-extracting data from a lab report file.
frontend/src/pages/AnalysisPage.tsx: Page component that renders the Progression Analysis view with a header and the AnalysisDashboard component.
frontend/src/pages/FamilyMembersPage.tsx: Page for managing family member profiles, supporting adding (up to 8) and deleting members along with their associated medical records.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying a hero section, summary stats, and feature cards linking to Add Record, Timeline, and Analysis pages.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, showing a branded UI and redirecting already-authenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/TimelinePage.tsx: Page component that renders the Medical Timeline view with a header and the TimelineView component.
frontend/src/types/fileUpload.ts: TypeScript type definitions for file upload state, including file metadata, extracted test data structure, and upload status enum.
frontend/src/types/medicalRecords.ts: TypeScript interfaces, constants, and field definitions for all medical record types (CBC, LFT, Cholesterol, Blood Sugar, Blood Pressure, General Ailments), including labels, colors, and reference ranges.
frontend/src/utils/recordSummary.ts: Utility functions to aggregate medical records by category, computing counts and latest dates to produce sorted category summaries.
frontend/src/utils/trendAnalysis.ts: Utility functions for analyzing metric trends across medical records, including slope computation, trend direction classification, chart data building, and per-category metric key definitions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), typography, container queries, animation plugins, and extended theme settings.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a React + Motoko web medical records tracker with features like CBC/LFT/etc. tracking, family profiles, OCR uploads, and AI analysis, currently tracking a known OCR date-parsing bug.
